# Chris Misztur

> Chris Misztur is the President & Founder of Mr. IIoT, specializing in building Smart Factories, both real and virtual. With 25+ years of experience, he integrates business systems into manufacturing processes, driving digital transformation through innovative technologies and a focus on continuous learning.

Based in the Greater Chicago Area, Chris is an expert in Industrial IoT, Industry 4.0, and digital transformation, empowering manufacturers to leverage real-time data for operational excellence. His expertise includes the "5C" closed-loop feedback approach and developing solutions like the SHARC IoT Adapter and DIME Software Suite.

## Pages
[Home](https://chrismisztur.com/): Overview of Chris Misztur's expertise, services, and client testimonials.
[About](https://chrismisztur.com/about.html): Learn more about Chris's background, professional timeline, and core values.
[Services](https://chrismisztur.com/services.html): Detailed descriptions of digital Industry 4.0, business system integration, industrial automation, and AI/LLM implementation services.
[Solutions](https://chrismisztur.com/solutions.html): Specific solutions tailored for industries like discrete manufacturing, metal fabrication, automotive supply chain, food & beverage, and aerospace.
[Process](https://chrismisztur.com/process.html): Explains the four-stage methodology: Discovery, Design, Deploy, and Deliver.
[Contact](https://chrismisztur.com/contact.html): Ways to get in touch, including email and a Calendly booking link.
[Free IIoT Assessment](https://chrismisztur.com/audit.html): Book a complimentary 30-minute call to evaluate digital transformation readiness.

## Contact

Response Time: Usually within 24 hours
